titleStmt.title: SII 37.158: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 158. (A.R. No. B 36 of 1939-40.) Maddūru, Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up infront of the Namaśivāya-maṭham.
This is dated Śaka 1454, Khara, Chaitra śu. 15, Lunar eclipse corresponding to 1531 A.D., April 1, Saturday.

It records the gift of taxes realized at Maddūru on several items such as cattle, weights etc. by the tax officer (suṁkha maniyagāṁḍu), Pāparāju Koṇḍaya for the worship of gods Ishṭakāmēśvara and Bhairavēśvara of Siddhavaṭam and for the merit of the king Achyutarāya on the occasion of lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jaddhayayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1454 Agunēṁṭi kha
ra saṁvatsara caitra su 15 lu . śrīmamahā
rājādhirājarājaparamēsvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrī Acyuta dēvarāya mahārāyalu vi
jayanagaramaṁddu vīrasiṁhāsanārūḍu
ḍai sakaḷa sāṁbrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu śrī
śailadakṣaṇadvāra śrī siddavaṭa Iṣṭhakāmēśvara bhairavē
svarulaku siddavaṭa sīma suṁkhamaṇiyagāṁḍu
pāparāju koṁḍaya daṁḍaṁveṭṭi Iccina dha¨rmaśā
sanaṁ kramameṭlannanu siddavaṭānaku cellē sakilisīma
lōna bhairavēsvarulaku cellivaccē maddūri grāmaṁ stā
varakaṭnaṁ sthānaṁvāru pērulakānuka vaccēpasara
pēyalu kolucuguṁḍlakunu vaccē suṁkhaṁ
maddūri grāmaṁlōnu Āvupasaraṁ peyalakolu
cu guṁḍlaku vaccē suṁkhaṁ grāmaṁlōnu kāṁ
Āvu pasaraṁ peyalu kolucu guṁḍla
vaccē suṁkhaṁ mōdalaina sōmagrahaṇa puṇya
kālamaṁdu Accitarāyalaku puṇyaṁgādāravō
sina suṁkaśāsanaṁ Iṁduku yavvaru dappi
nānu brāṁhmaṇiṁ caṁpina
pōvuduru maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 37.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
